dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Dose once-daily. Titrate up to a maximum dose of 10/320/25 mg. ( 2.1 ) Exforge HCT may be used as add-on/switch therapy for patients not adequately controlled on any two of the following antihypertensive classes: calcium channel blockers, angiotensin receptor blockers, and diuretics. ( 2.2 ) Exforge HCT may be substituted for its individually titrated components. ( 2.3 ) 2.1 General Considerations Dose once-daily. The dosage may be increased after 2 weeks of therapy.
